nonWeapon.name: Alertness
nonWeapon.description: Notice unusual details, ambush signs, and environmental clues.

nonWeapon.name: Animal Handling
nonWeapon.description: Calm, train, and guide domesticated or semi-trained animals.

nonWeapon.name: Direction Sense
nonWeapon.description: Maintain orientation and avoid becoming lost.

nonWeapon.name: Endurance
nonWeapon.description: Resist fatigue from forced marches and harsh conditions.

nonWeapon.name: Healing
nonWeapon.description: Provide first aid and improve natural recovery.

nonWeapon.name: Herbalism
nonWeapon.description: Identify, harvest, and prepare useful plants.

nonWeapon.name: Language, Ancient
nonWeapon.description: Read and interpret dead or rare written tongues.

nonWeapon.name: Reading/Writing
nonWeapon.description: Read and write known spoken languages.

nonWeapon.name: Riding, Land-Based
nonWeapon.description: Ride horses and similar mounts safely.

nonWeapon.name: Rope Use
nonWeapon.description: Tie knots, secure loads, and rig climbing lines.

nonWeapon.name: Seamanship
nonWeapon.description: Operate safely aboard boats and ships.

nonWeapon.name: Survival
nonWeapon.description: Forage, find shelter, and endure the wilds.

nonWeapon.name: Swimming
nonWeapon.description: Swim in calm and rough waters.

nonWeapon.name: Weather Sense
nonWeapon.description: Predict near-term weather changes.

nonWeapon.name: Armorer
nonWeapon.description: Repair armor and maintain protective gear.

nonWeapon.name: Blind-fighting
nonWeapon.description: Reduce penalties while fighting in darkness or obscurity.

nonWeapon.name: Bowyer/Fletcher
nonWeapon.description: Craft and maintain bows, arrows, and bolts.

nonWeapon.name: Weaponsmithing
nonWeapon.description: Forge and repair metal weapons.

nonWeapon.name: Ancient History
nonWeapon.description: Know older empires, events, and sacred traditions.

nonWeapon.name: Astronomy
nonWeapon.description: Track celestial patterns for navigation and ritual timing.

nonWeapon.name: Religion
nonWeapon.description: Understand rites, dogma, and holy symbols.

nonWeapon.name: Spellcraft
nonWeapon.description: Analyze magical effects and sacred spell structures.

nonWeapon.name: Alchemy
nonWeapon.description: Prepare alchemical compounds and experimental mixtures.

nonWeapon.name: Engineering
nonWeapon.description: Design and evaluate structural and mechanical systems.

nonWeapon.name: Local History
nonWeapon.description: Know the major events and figures of nearby regions.

nonWeapon.name: Planar Lore
nonWeapon.description: Identify outer planes, entities, and planar hazards.

nonWeapon.name: Appraising
nonWeapon.description: Estimate value and spot forgeries in goods and treasure.

nonWeapon.name: Disguise
nonWeapon.description: Create convincing false identities and appearances.

nonWeapon.name: Forgery
nonWeapon.description: Produce convincing written and visual fakes.

nonWeapon.name: Gaming
nonWeapon.description: Play games of chance and infer opponents' habits.

nonWeapon.name: Set Snares
nonWeapon.description: Construct and hide simple traps and snares.
